case_title: NATIONWIDE AGRIBUSINESS INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE AGRIBUSINESS INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-18-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-15-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-25-2017

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17197062), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE AGRIBUSINESS INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JUN-26-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60902059) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DEMAND FOR JURY (TRANSACTION ID # 60902059) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 61146654) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE AGRIBUSINESS INSURANCE COMPANY JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS
OFFER TO COMPROMISE AND ACCEPTANCE OF OFFER TO COMPROMISE (TRANSACTION ID # 61415645) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO PLAINTIFF NATIONWIDE AGRIBUSINESS INSURANCE COMPANY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61415645)
OBJECTION TO COURT COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEMPORE AT TRIAL PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 6.1(A) AND (C) (TRANSACTION ID # 60902059) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 61174852) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST OF NOV-15-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-13-2017. THE OCT-18-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR RALPH WELLS ROBINSON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-15-2017 THROUGH FEB-13-2018.
